offer.subject: ShopiFixer Fix Sprint for cart-agent-dev.myshopify.com

sections.benchmark_position: This store is performing below roughly 56% of similar Shopify stores on checkout completion and recovery readiness.
sections.why_it_matters: The audit surface identifies a benchmark-backed checkout friction issue. If the mobile checkout handoff stays slow, the store remains below a meaningful portion of similar Shopify stores on checkout completion and recovery readiness.

offer.body:
Hi,

Here is the ShopiFixer Conversion Brief for cart-agent-dev.myshopify.com.

Problem Found:
Slow mobile checkout handoff

Benchmark Position:
This store is performing below roughly 56% of similar Shopify stores on checkout completion and recovery readiness.

Why It Matters:
The audit surface identifies a benchmark-backed checkout friction issue. If the mobile checkout handoff stays slow, the store remains below a meaningful portion of similar Shopify stores on checkout completion and recovery readiness.

Fix Recommendation:
Tighten the mobile checkout path and remove unnecessary handoff friction.

What The $950 Fix Sprint Includes:
1. Diagnosis
2. Scoped fix
3. Before evidence
4. After evidence
5. Merchant-facing proof package
6. Completion decision
7. Intake summary
8. Fix scope
9. Execution notes

What Proof They Will Receive:
1. Before-state evidence
2. After-state evidence
3. Merchant-facing proof summary
4. Completion decision

ShopiFixer Fix Sprint: $950

Abando remains a separate optional SaaS product and is not part of this offer.

Call To Action:
Get the $950 Fix Sprint

This offer is for the fix sprint only.

– Ross
Stafford Media Consulting
